ReportConfig.description: Where to forward the aggregated run summary after `perfscale run` finishes.

url.description: Base URL of a running `perfscale serve` instance, e.g. `http://localhost:7999`.

Step.description: A single step in a test definition.

check.description: Post-execution assertions.  Keys are assertion names; values are expected values.  Example: `{ "status": 200, "duration_ms_lt": 500 }`.

name.description: Human-readable label shown in log output.

outputs.description: Variable name to store step output under for `${{ name.field }}` use.

use.description: Action identifier, e.g. `"std/http@v1"`. Written as `use:` in YAML; `uses:` is accepted as an alias (GitHub-Actions muscle memory).

uses.description: Action identifier, e.g. `"std/http@v1"`. Written as `use:` in YAML; `uses:` is accepted as an alias (GitHub-Actions muscle memory).

before.description: Setup steps run **once** before the load starts (not per VU iteration). Each step's `outputs` is exposed to test steps under the `config` namespace, e.g. a `before` step with `outputs: fix_config` is read in a test as `${{ config.fix_config.<field> }}`. If any setup step fails, the run aborts before spawning VUs.

variables.description: Static variables exposed to `before` and test steps under the `vars` namespace, e.g. `${{ vars.region }}`. Values may themselves be objects.
